name: Banana-Ginger Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Spray muffin tins with nonstick vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, mash bananas and mix in egg whites, brown sugar, melted margarine, vanilla extract, and lemon zest until combined.
3. In another bowl, sift together all-purpose flour, whole-wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and ground ginger. Stir in oat bran.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the banana mixture, stirring just until blended. Fold in crystallized ginger and raisins.
5. Divide batter evenly among prepared muffin tins.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove muffins from tins and place on a wire rack.
7. In a small bowl, whisk powdered sugar with lemon juice to make a glaze. Brush over hot muffins before serving.
Note: The original recipe text contained additional information and notes that were not part of the core recipe itself. These have been removed for clarity.
